criteria_results.description: MobileBottomBar has a boolean state `isDrawerOpen` initialized to false, updated via Drawer's `onOpenChange` prop
criteria_results.evidence: In MobileBottomBar.tsx: `const [isDrawerOpen, setIsDrawerOpen] = useState(false);` (line 53) and `<Drawer open={isDrawerOpen} onOpenChange={setIsDrawerOpen}>` (line 102).

criteria_results.description: The status buttons row (lines 168-210 area) is conditionally rendered only when `!isDrawerOpen`
criteria_results.evidence: In MobileBottomBar.tsx: `{!isDrawerOpen && isPM && selectedObject && ...}` (line 168) conditionally renders the status buttons row.

criteria_results.description: A Dialog wraps ObjectPhotoGallery and renders when `isGalleryOpen` is true, with `onOpenChange` bound to `setIsGalleryOpen`
ObjectPhotoGallery lightbox Dialog (line 286 area) contains an explicit Button with X icon for closing, positioned at top-right with min size h-10 w-10
criteria_results.evidence: In ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx: Explicit close button at lines 331-338 with `className="absolute top-4 right-4 h-11 w-11 ..."` and `<X className="h-8 w-8" />` icon.

criteria_results.description: TypeScript type checking passes with `npm run check`
criteria_results.evidence: Executed `npm run check` successfully with no errors.

commit_message.subject: Add photo count and gallery close button on mobile
commit_message.body:
This commit addresses mobile UI improvements:
- Adds photo count in parentheses to the PHOTO button in MobileBottomBar.
- Conditionally hides the status buttons row when the object details
drawer is open to reduce vertical clutter.
- Implements a dedicated Dialog for the ObjectPhotoGallery accessible
from the bottom bar.
- Adds an explicit close button (X) to the photo lightbox in
ObjectPhotoGallery for easier navigation on mobile.
